rules.name: Project_Manager_Submits_for_Client_Approval

rightValue.stringValue: Project Manager Submits for Client Approval

rules.label: Project Manager Submits for Client Approval

rightValue.stringValue: Developer Submits for Approval to Project Manager

rules.label: Developer Submits for Approval to Project Manager

rightValue.stringValue: Project Manager Rejects In Progress Task

rules.label: Project Manager Rejects In Progress Task

rules.name: Project_Manager_Accepts_In_Progress_Task

rightValue.stringValue: Project Manager Accepts In Progress Task

rules.label: Project Manager Accepts In Progress Task

rules.name: Project_Manager_Submits_for_Client_Review

rightValue.stringValue: Project Manager Submits for Client Review

rules.label: Project Manager Submits for Client Review

Flow.description: V2: Reject rollbacks use formulas Assign_Project_Task_Rollback_Reject_Fields; PM code reviewer flags unchanged.

formulas.name: form_txt_Rollback_Status_For_Task
formulas.expression: IF( TEXT({!$Record.Submission_Status__c}) = "Client Rejects Backlog Task", IF( TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Status__c}) = "In Review", "Pending", IF( TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Status__c}) = "In Progress", "Backlog", IF( TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Status__c}) = "Pending", "Backlog", TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Status__c}) ) ) ), IF( TEXT({!$Record.Submission_Status__c}) = "Project Manager Rejects In Progress Task", "In Progress", IF( TEXT({!$Record.Submission_Status__c}) = "Client Rejects Completion", "Backlog", TEXT({!$Record.Status__c}) ) ) )

formulas.name: form_txt_Rollback_Submission_Status_For_Task
formulas.expression: IF( TEXT({!$Record.Submission_Status__c}) = "Client Rejects Backlog Task", IF( TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Submission_Status__c}) = "Project Manager Submits for Client Approval", "Developer Completes Work/Testing", IF( TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Submission_Status__c}) = "Developer Submits for Approval to Project Manager", "Developer Working", IF( TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Submission_Status__c}) = "Developer Completes Work/Testing", "Developer Assigned to Pending", IF( TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Submission_Status__c}) = "Developer Working", "Client Approves Pending", TEXT({!$Record__Prior.Submission_Status__c}) ) ) ) ), IF( TEXT({!$Record.Submission_Status__c}) = "Project Manager Rejects In Progress Task", "Developer Working", IF( TEXT({!$Record.Submission_Status__c}) = "Client Rejects Completion", "Client Approves Pending", TEXT({!$Record.Submission_Status__c}) ) ) )

formulas.name: form_txt_SubmittingUserRole
formulas.expression: IF( CASESAFEID({!$User.ContactId}) = CASESAFEID({!$Record.Project_Manager__c}), "Project Manager", IF( CASESAFEID({!$User.ContactId}) = CASESAFEID({!$Record.Client_User__c}), "Client User", IF( CASESAFEID({!$User.ContactId}) = CASESAFEID({!$Record.Developer__c}), "Developer", "" ) ) )

Flow.label: Record Trigger - Project Task - Update Submission Status V2
